info.description: Web Services for managing the 3DSupplyNetwork modeler.
info.title: 3DSupplyNetwork Web Services

get.description: Search Buyer Companies based on name criteria or external Ids. Can be used on 3drdfindex.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Full name or part of the name of a Buyer Companie. Special character should be encoded.

parameters.name: externalSource
parameters.description: Soure of an externalId. Special character should be encoded.

parameters.name: externalIdentifier
parameters.description: Identifier from an externalId. Special character should be encoded.

parameters.name: mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned.

member.example: [Response will be returned with oneOf mask available in the Schema Tab.]

parameters.name: CompID
parameters.description: URI of a Supplier Company.

get.description: Get details of the Buyer Company given as ID. Can be used on 3drdfindex.

parameters.name: mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned.

schema.example: Response will be returned with oneOf mask available in the Schema Tab.

post.description: Create a Supplier Company including Company definition and Relationship definition.

get.description: Search Supplier Companies based on name criteria. Can be used on 3drdfindex instead.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Full name or part of the name of Supplier Companies. Special character should be encoded.

parameters.name: externalSource
parameters.description: Soure of an externalId. Special character should be encoded.

parameters.name: externalIdentifier
parameters.description: Identifier from an externalId. Special character should be encoded.

parameters.name: mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned.

member.example: [Response will be returned with oneOf mask available in the Schema Tab.]

parameters.name: CompID
parameters.description: URI of a Supplier Company.

parameters.name: mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned.

schema.example: Response will be returned with oneOf mask available in the Schema Tab.

patch.description: Update the Supplier Company's properties given as ID.

parameters.name: CompID
parameters.description: URI of a Supplier Company.

post.description: Create a Supplier Company's Relationship Specialization.

get.description: List all Relationships Specialization of a Supplier Company. Can be used on 3drdfindex instead.

parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned.

parameters.name: SpeID

parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned.

parameters.name: CompID

post.description: Invite a Supplier User to a Supplier Company. The Supplier User will be fully created once he connect to the portal for the first time

mesage.example: Welcome to our new collaboration experience

get.description: List all Supplier User of a Supplier Company. Can be used on 3drdfindex instead.

parameters.name: mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned.

member.example: [Response will be returned with oneOf mask available in the Schema Tab.]

parameters.name: CompID
parameters.description: URI of a Supplier Company.

parameters.name: UserID
parameters.description: URI of a Supplier User.

get.description: Get Supplier User's details from a Supplier Company. Can be used on 3drdfindex instead.

parameters.name: mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned.

patch.description: Activate an inactive Supplier User or deactivate an active Supplier User.

delete.description: Delete a pending or inactive Supplier User.

relationship.description: If only one relationship exist with the old buyer

relationships.description: If multiple relationships exist with different buyer

skip.name: skip
skip.description: Skip a number of result equal to the parameter.

top.name: top
top.description: Number of returned results. Must be an integer between 1 and 50 included.

X-Requested-With.name: X-Requested-With
X-Requested-With.description: Required header. The value should be XMLHttpRequest

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request requires user authentication.

code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

403.description: FORBIDDEN. The server understood the request, but is refusing to fulfill it.

code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

404.description: NOT FOUND. Requested ressources was not found.

code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.
